title: Marani No. 8 Kisi Amber 2023
shortDescription: Textural amber wine with orchard fruit and spice
tastingNotes: Apricot skin. Black tea. Gentle grip and a savoury finish that makes this brilliant with cheese or roast squash.
danielNote: Daniel recommends this when someone says they want orange wine without too much funk.
privateStaffNote: Lead with the Georgia story and offer alongside soft washed-rind cheese.

title: Cloudline Mountain Mist Pet Nat 2024
shortDescription: Joyful Taiwanese pet nat with citrus and blossom
tastingNotes: Green plum. Jasmine. Lemon curd. Slight haze and plenty of lift for celebrations or aperitif hour.
danielNote: This is the party bottle: bright, conversational, and genuinely memorable.
privateStaffNote: Merchandise beside gift vouchers and weekend hosting copy.

title: Cedars of Bekaa High Plateau Rose 2024
shortDescription: Crisp Lebanese rose with citrus and herbs
tastingNotes: Wild strawberry. Pink grapefruit. Dried mint. Bone-dry and very good with salty snacks and sunny tables.
danielNote: This is the bottle for guests who think they do not like rose.
privateStaffNote: Push collection because chilled handoff is part of the experience.

title: Boundary Line North Fork Riesling 2022
regionLabel: Seneca Lake, Finger Lakes, United States
shortDescription: Electric New York Riesling with bright acidity
tastingNotes: Lime zest. White peach. Slatey freshness. A proper fridge-door white for midweek dinners.
danielNote: If you want to show someone American wine can be serious, start here.
privateStaffNote: Do not pour by the glass unless a tasting event needs it.

title: Monsoon Cellars Method Rose 2024
shortDescription: Currently pouring at the bar and worth asking for
tastingNotes: Cloudy strawberry fruit. Lifted spice. Fine fizz. Built for discovery rather than the standard brunch sparkler.
danielNote: Perfect for the guest who wants something unusual by the glass.
